Description: The 1N4148WX is a general-purpose, surface-mount silicon switching diode designed for fast switching applications. It features a very low reverse recovery time, making it suitable for high-frequency rectification, signal demodulation, and digital logic circuits. It is housed in a compact SOD-323 package with polarity indicated by a cathode band.

KeyParameters.Maximum Reverse Current (IR): 25 nA @ VR=20V, Tj=25°C / 1.0 µA @ VR=75V, Tj=25°C

Functions.FunctionDescription: Negative terminal, marked by a band, current exits here
